name: larch
description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: design, code review, implementation, and PR automation with collaborative reviewers (Claude subagents + Codex + Cursor).

slack_bot_token.title: Slack Bot Token
slack_bot_token.description: Slack Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...) for PR announcements. Also accepted via LARCH_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN env var.

slack_channel_id.title: Slack Channel ID
slack_channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (e.g., C0123456789) for PR announcements. Also accepted via LARCH_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID env var.

slack_user_id.title: Slack User ID
slack_user_id.description: Your Slack user ID (e.g., U0123456789) for @-mentions in announcements. Also accepted via LARCH_SLACK_USER_ID env var.
